meta.title: Pricing | NexGen
meta.description: Starter, Pro, and Elite plans. Save up to HK$1,200/year with a quarterly plan.
header.title: Choose the right plan for you
header.subtitle: All-inclusive monthly fee. No hidden charges. No contract.
tiers.starter.name: Starter
tiers.starter.description: An AI chat assistant on Telegram, ready whenever you need it. Basic setup, ready to use. Ideal for occasional AI users.
tiers.pro.name: Pro
tiers.pro.tagline: Learns more about you with every conversation
tiers.pro.description: Remembers everything you’ve ever said, searches the web for the latest information, and runs 24/7. Not just a Q&A bot — a personal assistant that truly knows you.
tiers.elite.name: Elite
tiers.elite.tagline: Multiple AIs working simultaneously, taking action for you
tiers.elite.description: Multiple AI agents working at once — one researching, one writing reports, one comparing prices and booking tickets. Browser automation included. Built for entrepreneurs and power users.
tiers.savingsNudge: Switch to quarterly and save up to HK${{savings}}/year
features.memory.detailPro: Remembers all conversations, preferences, and habits
features.memory.detailElite: Remembers all conversations, preferences, and habits
features.search.detailPro: Including sites that block AI, like Reddit

openClaw.heading: What is OpenClaw?
openClaw.tagline: Your personal AI — it doesn’t just chat, it takes action.
openClaw.body1: OpenClaw is an AI agent installed on your own server that communicates with you via Telegram. It’s not a shared cloud service — it runs on your own machine, and your data stays entirely yours.
openClaw.body2: OpenClaw goes beyond chat. It can search the web, manage files, schedule tasks, operate a browser, and complete work while you sleep. The project is open-source with an active community building new features. You can choose Claude, GPT, or local models — your data always stays on your server.
openClaw.features.automation.title: Daily Automation
openClaw.features.automation.desc: Set reminders, schedule tasks, manage your calendar — handle everyday tasks through conversation
openClaw.features.research.title: Research & Data
openClaw.features.research.desc: Search the web, organize information, generate reports while you focus on other things
openClaw.features.integration.title: Smart Integration
openClaw.features.integration.desc: Connect multiple tools and platforms, automate workflows
openClaw.features.browser.title: Browser Automation
openClaw.features.browser.desc: Price comparison, booking, form filling, ticket grabbing — AI operates the browser for you
payment.postCheckout: After submitting the form, choose a payment method to complete your order. Installation begins within 30 minutes of payment confirmation.
help.heading: Need help choosing?
help.subtitle: Submit a support ticket and we’ll recommend the best plan for you.
